extensionDescription.message: ClearMind is a browser extension that helps overcome porn addiction.

customBlocklistLimitReached.message: Custom blocklist limit of 4900 domains reached

whatsNewIntro.message: Hello! It's been a rough year, but we're back with good news! Say hey to ClearMind 2.0 and all its amazing features.

whatsNewPerformance.message: Refined Experience — A faster filtering and smoother, more intuitive interface.

whatsNewProtection.message: Enhanced Security — Now with advanced multi-layered shield against adult materials.

whatsNewLocalization.message: Universal Support — Now supporting 13 languages, helping people stay clear and focused across the globe.

whatsNewAboutUpdate.message: Seamless Access — Explore our redesigned About page to easily find support, source code, and community resources.
